reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real ~92MB download+run, first-visit + cached auto-init, light+dark, mobile+desktop)

rubric.evidence: REAL WASM run verified headless (fresh profile → 'Download model (~92 MB)' → click → run): 'Die Hauptstadt von Deutschland ist [MASK].' → 'Berlin' in 52 ms; logits tensor [1,9,31102] read via AutoModelForMaskedLM. Console clean (0 errors). conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): loads-clean + calls-real-inference pass.

Correct shape + semantics: masked-LM logits [1, seq, 31102] over the German WordPiece vocabulary; row sliced at the [MASK] position and softmaxed on-device. Top token 'Berlin' for the German capital cloze is semantically right, not fake. | conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual.

At-a-glance links onnx-community/distilbert-base-german-cased-ONNX, states fill-mask · WASM · q8. Inference off the main thread in worker.js (AutoModelForMaskedLM). conformance: declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation + inference-off-main-thread all pass.

Fresh profile shows 'Download model (~92 MB)'; after load the shared loader reaches state=ready with a 'Clear cached model' control; a returning visit (same profile) auto-inits from the transformers.js cache with NO Load click and re-runs the sample ('Berlin', 32 ms). The optional multilingual comparison keeps its own on-demand 'Download model (~180 MB)' button (mBERT, user-initiated). | conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: VISIT 2 loader button was 'Clear cached model', state 'ready', no Download.

rubric.evidence: Streamed download progress on first load; Retry surfaced on failure by the shared loader; live #runStatus region reports 'add a [MASK]' / prediction errors; offline reuse via the transformers.js cache. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU); headless no-GPU run produced real German fills. | conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Sentence input, German sample chips, Insert-[MASK] button, top-k slider, clickable prediction rows (fill the mask), the on-demand comparison loader, and the ladder tools (autocomplete accept/reset, register chips, compound splitter, multi-model comparison) all operable and keyboard-accessible. | conformance: controls-operable=manual, buttons-have-names=pass.

Predictions + logits are produced by the on-device AutoModelForMaskedLM run (real output samples recorded above); the multi-model rung runs a SECOND on-device model (mBERT, bert-base-multilingual-cased) on the same sentence — verified German→'Berlin' vs mBERT→'Frankfurt' disagreement. No canned result anywhere. | conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

role=status aria-live #runStatus + loader status; labelled input + slider; sample/register chips are real buttons in labelled groups; prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons; WordPiece token chips carry titles. conformance: images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass.

Desktop 1280 and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow (measured 0px), legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, [MASK] shown as code, chips flex-wrap, token strip wraps, and the prediction grid collapses (logit column hidden) under 560px; light + dark screenshots reviewed. | conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

The masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 31k vocab runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms); the two-model comparison runs both forwards off-thread via Promise.all. Main thread stays responsive; 0 console errors. | conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up heavy main-thread work; keep the interaction path clear.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread (worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM + the full-vocab softmax); the UI only renders the returned top-k; the comparison uses Promise.all of two off-thread runs.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 52 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports; let content wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample chips + token strip; a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-mobile=pass at 360px; measured 0px horizontal overflow; mobile screenshot reviewed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels; don't rely on placeholder.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the sentence <input> has an associated <label>; the top-k slider is labelled; sample/register chips are real buttons in labelled groups.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic errors in an aria-live region on the page, not only the console.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus / #vsStatus / #cmpStatus report 'add a [MASK]' and prediction/comparison failures with an .err class.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; keyboard-operable.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled controls, prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons that fill the mask, live status region.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use modern flex/grid intrinsic sizing for responsive component layouts.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — probe-grid two-column comparison collapses to one column under 620px; token strip is a wrapping flex row.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: desktop + mobile screenshots reviewed, 0px overflow both classes

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for german-bert-fill-mask (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.
Add a German POS/NER second model to the multi-model rung to tag the filled sentence (in addition to the German-vs-multilingual comparison).

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for german-bert-fill-mask: real ~92 MB download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (first-visit Download → 'Die Hauptstadt von Deutschland ist Berlin.' at 52 ms WASM, logits [1,9,31102]; cached auto-init with 'Clear cached model' and no Download button, re-run 32 ms; console clean both visits), plus the German-native vs multilingual comparison (verified German DistilBERT→'Berlin' vs mBERT→'Frankfurt') and the WordPiece compound-word token strip. Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible, [MASK] renders as code). Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
